candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferable to total/subtotal labels when equivalent values are shown.

Financial income, not operating revenue.

Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue. 'Operating Revenue' is preferred because 'Total Revenue' is an exact duplicate in the preview.
No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present on the provided Income Statement. Operating expenses are disclosed by overhead categories rather than direct cost of sales.

candidates.why: Core overhead component and a strong SG&A candidate.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component; should be included as overhead.
Broad operating overhead bucket above EBIT; appropriate when no single SG&A subtotal exists.

candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Equity reserve, not SG&A expense.
Headcount disclosure, not expense.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the best overhead components above EBIT and excluded D&A, impairments, finance items, and totals/subtotals.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related wording is present, but this is specifically amortization within R&D, not a dedicated R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Licenses Patents and Acquired Research and Development - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Licenses Patents and Acquired Research and Development - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense line is clearly reported. The only R&D-related income statement row is an amortization subcomponent, which should not be used as total R&D expense.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense label; useful for years where this is the reported line.

Profit attribution item, not interest expense.

Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring financing cost rows and avoided 'Net financial items' because it includes non-interest items. Included both main interest labels as a priority-across-years approach plus lease interest as an additional recurring component. Excluded supplemental duplicate and FX/other financial items.

variables.notes: Preferred 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' because it is the most specific owner equity line available. Included 'Total Equity' as fallback across years.
